security.item: Hardened command palette URL validation against unsafe schemes and external administrator URLs.

fix.item: Fixed Web Asset Manager asset version metadata to match the package release version.
Updated the package install script so the system plugin is auto-enabled on first install only and is not forced back on during updates.
Improved output escaping in the administrator dashboard integration.
Cleaned update server handling so updates are managed through the package manifest.

addition.item: Added Joomla update server metadata for the package release.
Added full GPL license file and reviewed GPL license notices.
Added SHA-256 checksum metadata for package update verification.
Added Joomla native keyboard shortcut registration support.

change.item: Focused package requirements on Joomla 6.1+ and PHP 8.3+.
Improved ACL filtering for Joomla core administrator links.
Improved Atum-oriented command palette accessibility, focus handling and keyboard behaviour.
Updated package, component, plugin and asset metadata to version 0.1.17.
Improved keyboard shortcut descriptions for Windows, Linux and macOS users.

note.item: Package structure prepared for JED Checker validation.
Use Ctrl + K on Windows/Linux or Cmd + K on macOS in Joomla Administrator to open JT Admin Finder.
Joomla native keyboard shortcut support is available with J then K.
